## ЁЯФТ DEPLOYMENT VERIFICATION CHAIN

### Signature Flow

```
GitHub Actions (DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY secret)
    тЖУ (sign all transactions)
zhBqbd9tSQFPevg4188JxcgpccCj3t1Jxb29zsBc2R4
    тЖУ (deploy on mainnet)
Solana Mainnet (All 7 programs)
    тЖУ (record in explorer)
Transaction Hash тЖТ Explorer Link
```

### Owner Verification Method

To verify on-chain ownership:

```bash
# Query program owner on Solana
solana program show <PROGRAM_ID> --url mainnet-beta

# Expected output:
# Program Id | <PROGRAM_ID>
# Owner      | BPFLoaderUpgradeab1e11111111111111111111111
# Authority  | zhBqbd9tSQFPevg4188JxcgpccCj3t1Jxb29zsBc2R4
```
